mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation_upload (consultation_id, file_name, file_type, file_url, file_size, ocr_result, ai_review) VALUES (#{consultationId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{ocrResult}, #{aiReview})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM consultation_upload WHERE consultation_id = #{consultationId} ORDER BY create_time
mapper.update: UPDATE consultation_upload SET ocr_result = #{ocrResult} WHERE id = #{id}
